data.value: {"Label": "Serial Shipping Container Code (SSCC)","Attribute": true,"Regex": "(\\d{18})","Captures": [{"CheckDigit": true,"Fixed": true,"Length": 18}]}

{"Label": "Global Trade Item Number (GTIN)","Attribute": true,"Regex": "(\\d{14})","Qualifiers": ["22","10","21","235"],"Excludes": ["02","03","255","37"],"Captures": [{"CheckDigit": true,"Fixed": true,"Length": 14}]}

{"Label": "Global Trade Item Number (GTIN) of contained trade items","Attribute": true,"Regex": "(\\d{14})","Requires": ["0037","00","37"],"Excludes": ["01","03"],"Captures": [{"CheckDigit": true,"Fixed": true,"Length": 14}]}
data.comment: Global Trade Item Number (GTIN) of contained trade items (GTIN_CONTENT)

data.value: {"Label": "Identification of a Made-to-Order (MtO) trade item (GTIN)","Regex": "(\\d{14})","Excludes": ["01","02","37"],"Captures": [{"CheckDigit": true,"Fixed": true,"Length": 14}]}
data.comment: Identification of a Made-to-Order (MtO) trade item (GTIN) (GTIN_MTO)

data.value: {"Label": "Variable count of items (variable measure trade item)","Attribute": true,"Regex": "(\\d{0,8})","Requires": ["01","02"],"Captures": [{"Length": 8}]}
data.comment: Variable count of items (variable measure trade item) (VARIABLE_COUNT)

data.value: {"Label": "Count of trade items or trade item pieces contained in a logistic unit","Attribute": true,"Regex": "(\\d{1,8})","Requires": ["0002","00","02","008026","00","8026"],"Captures": [{"Length": 8}]}
data.comment: Count of trade items or trade item pieces contained in a logistic unit (COUNT)

data.value: {"Label": "Information mutually agreed between trading partners","Attribute": true,"Regex": "([!%-?A-Z_a-z\\x22]{1,30})","Captures": [{"Length": 30}]}
data.comment: Information mutually agreed between trading partners (INTERNAL_TRADEPARTNER)

data.value: {"Label": "Third Party Controlled, Serialised Extension of Global Trade Item Number (GTIN) (TPX)","Regex": "([!%-?A-Z_a-z\\x22]{1,28})","Requires": ["01"],"Captures": [{"Length": 28}]}
data.comment: Third Party Controlled, Serialised Extension of Global Trade Item Number (GTIN) (TPX) (TPX)

data.value: {"Label": "Additional product identification assigned by the manufacturer","Attribute": true,"Regex": "([!%-?A-Z_a-z\\x22]{1,30})","Requires": ["01","02","8006","8026"],"Captures": [{"Length": 30}]}
data.comment: Additional product identification assigned by the manufacturer (ADDITIONAL_ID)

data.value: {"Label": "Global Document Type Identifier (GDTI)","Attribute": true,"Regex": "(\\d{13})([!%-?A-Z_a-z\\x22]{0,17})","Captures": [{"CheckDigit": true,"Fixed": true,"Length": 13},{"Length": 17}]}
{"Label": "Global Shipment Identification Number (GSIN)","Attribute": true,"Regex": "(\\d{17})","Captures": [{"CheckDigit": true,"Fixed": true,"Length": 17}]}
{"Label": "Ship to / Deliver to Global Location Number (GLN)","Attribute": true,"Regex": "(\\d{13})","Captures": [{"CheckDigit": true,"Fixed": true,"Length": 13}]}
data.comment: Ship to / Deliver to Global Location Number (GLN) (SHIP_TO_GLN)

data.value: {"Label": "Bill to / Invoice to Global Location Number (GLN)","Attribute": true,"Regex": "(\\d{13})","Captures": [{"CheckDigit": true,"Fixed": true,"Length": 13}]}
data.comment: Bill to / Invoice to Global Location Number (GLN) (BILL_TO_GLN)

data.value: {"Label": "Purchased from Global Location Number (GLN)","Attribute": true,"Regex": "(\\d{13})","Captures": [{"CheckDigit": true,"Fixed": true,"Length": 13}]}
{"Label": "Ship for / Deliver for - Forward to Global Location Number (GLN)","Attribute": true,"Regex": "(\\d{13})","Captures": [{"CheckDigit": true,"Fixed": true,"Length": 13}]}
data.comment: Ship for / Deliver for - Forward to Global Location Number (GLN) (SHIP_FOR_LOC_GLN)

data.value: {"Label": "Identification of a physical location - Global Location Number (GLN)","Attribute": true,"Regex": "(\\d{13})","Qualifiers": ["254","7040"],"Captures": [{"CheckDigit": true,"Fixed": true,"Length": 13}]}
data.comment: Identification of a physical location - Global Location Number (GLN) (LOCATION_GLN)

data.value: {"Label": "Global Location Number (GLN) of the invoicing party","Attribute": true,"Regex": "(\\d{13})","Qualifiers": ["8020"],"Requires": ["8020"],"Captures": [{"CheckDigit": true,"Fixed": true,"Length": 13}]}
data.comment: Global Location Number (GLN) of the invoicing party (PAY_TO_GLN)

data.value: {"Label": "Global Location Number (GLN) of the production or service location","Attribute": true,"Regex": "(\\d{13})","Captures": [{"CheckDigit": true,"Fixed": true,"Length": 13}]}
data.comment: Global Location Number (GLN) of the production or service location (PRODUCTION_SERVICE_LOCATION_GLN)

data.value: {"Label": "Party Global Location Number (GLN)","Attribute": true,"Regex": "(\\d{13})","Qualifiers": ["7040"],"Captures": [{"CheckDigit": true,"Fixed": true,"Length": 13}]}
{"Label": "Ship to / Deliver to postal code within a single postal authority","Attribute": true,"Regex": "([!%-?A-Z_a-z\\x22]{1,20})","Excludes": ["421"],"Captures": [{"Length": 20}]}
data.comment: Ship to / Deliver to postal code within a single postal authority (SHIP_TO_POSTALCODE_LOCAL)

data.value: {"Label": "Ship to / Deliver to postal code with ISO country code","Attribute": true,"Regex": "(\\d{3})([!%-?A-Z_a-z\\x22]{1,9})","Excludes": ["4307"],"Captures": [{"Fixed": true,"Length": 3},{"Length": 9}]}
data.comment: Ship to / Deliver to postal code with ISO country code (SHIP_TO_POSTALCODE)

data.value: {"Label": "Country of origin of a trade item","Attribute": true,"Regex": "(\\d{3})","Requires": ["01","02","8006","8026"],"Excludes": ["426"],"Captures": [{"Fixed": true,"Length": 3}]}
data.comment: Country of origin of a trade item (ORIGIN)

data.value: {"Label": "Country covering full process chain","Attribute": true,"Regex": "(\\d{3})","Requires": ["01","02"],"Captures": [{"Fixed": true,"Length": 3}]}
{"Label": "National Healthcare Reimbursement Number (NHRN) - Germany PZN","Attribute": true,"Regex": "([!%-?A-Z_a-z\\x22]{1,20})","Requires": ["01"],"Captures": [{"Length": 20}]}
data.comment: National Healthcare Reimbursement Number (NHRN) - Germany PZN (NATIONAL_HEALTH_CARE_REIMBURSEMENT_NUMBER_PZN)

data.value: {"Label": "National Healthcare Reimbursement Number (NHRN) - France CIP","Attribute": true,"Regex": "([!%-?A-Z_a-z\\x22]{1,20})","Requires": ["01"],"Captures": [{"Length": 20}]}
data.comment: National Healthcare Reimbursement Number (NHRN) - France CIP (NATIONAL_HEALTH_CARE_REIMBURSEMENT_NUMBER_CIP)

data.value: {"Label": "National Healthcare Reimbursement Number (NHRN) - Spain CN","Attribute": true,"Regex": "([!%-?A-Z_a-z\\x22]{1,20})","Requires": ["01"],"Captures": [{"Length": 20}]}
data.comment: National Healthcare Reimbursement Number (NHRN) - Spain CN (NATIONAL_HEALTH_CARE_REIMBURSEMENT_NUMBER_CN)

data.value: {"Label": "National Healthcare Reimbursement Number (NHRN) - Brasil DRN","Attribute": true,"Regex": "([!%-?A-Z_a-z\\x22]{1,20})","Requires": ["01"],"Captures": [{"Length": 20}]}
data.comment: National Healthcare Reimbursement Number (NHRN) - Brasil DRN (NATIONAL_HEALTH_CARE_REIMBURSEMENT_NUMBER_DRN)

data.value: {"Label": "National Healthcare Reimbursement Number (NHRN) - Portugal AIM","Attribute": true,"Regex": "([!%-?A-Z_a-z\\x22]{1,20})","Requires": ["01"],"Captures": [{"Length": 20}]}
data.comment: National Healthcare Reimbursement Number (NHRN) - Portugal AIM (NATIONAL_HEALTH_CARE_REIMBURSEMENT_NUMBER_AIM)

data.value: {"Label": "National Healthcare Reimbursement Number (NHRN) - United States of America NDC","Attribute": true,"Regex": "([!%-?A-Z_a-z\\x22]{1,20})","Requires": ["01"],"Captures": [{"Length": 20}]}
data.comment: National Healthcare Reimbursement Number (NHRN) - United States of America NDC (NATIONAL_HEALTH_CARE_REIMBURSEMENT_NUMBER_NDC)

data.value: {"Label": "National Healthcare Reimbursement Number (NHRN) - Italy AIC","Attribute": true,"Regex": "([!%-?A-Z_a-z\\x22]{1,20})","Requires": ["01"],"Captures": [{"Length": 20}]}
data.comment: National Healthcare Reimbursement Number (NHRN) - Italy AIC (NATIONAL_HEALTH_CARE_REIMBURSEMENT_NUMBER_AIC)

data.value: {"Label": "National Healthcare Reimbursement Number (NHRN) - Costa Rica Sanitary Register Number","Attribute": true,"Regex": "([!%-?A-Z_a-z\\x22]{1,20})","Requires": ["01"],"Captures": [{"Length": 20}]}
data.comment: National Healthcare Reimbursement Number (NHRN) - Costa Rica Sanitary Register Number (NATIONAL_HEALTH_CARE_REIMBURSEMENT_NUMBER_SRN)

data.value: {"Label": "Net weight, kilograms (variable measure trade item)","Attribute": true,"Regex": "(\\d{6})","MaxElements": 6,"Requires": ["01","02"],"Excludes": ["31003105","3100"],"Captures": [{"Fixed": true,"Length": 6}]}
data.comment: Net weight, kilograms (variable measure trade item) (NET_WEIGHT)

data.value: {"Label": "Length or first dimension, metres (variable measure trade item)","Attribute": true,"Regex": "(\\d{6})","MaxElements": 6,"Requires": ["01","02"],"Excludes": ["31103115","3110"],"Captures": [{"Fixed": true,"Length": 6}]}
data.comment: Length or first dimension, metres (variable measure trade item) (LENGTH)

data.value: {"Label": "Width, diameter, or second dimension, metres (variable measure trade item)","Attribute": true,"Regex": "(\\d{6})","MaxElements": 6,"Requires": ["01","02"],"Excludes": ["31203125","3120"],"Captures": [{"Fixed": true,"Length": 6}]}
data.comment: Width, diameter, or second dimension, metres (variable measure trade item) (WIDTH)

data.value: {"Label": "Depth, thickness, height, or third dimension, metres (variable measure trade item)","Attribute": true,"Regex": "(\\d{6})","MaxElements": 6,"Requires": ["01","02"],"Excludes": ["31303135","3130"],"Captures": [{"Fixed": true,"Length": 6}]}
data.comment: Depth, thickness, height, or third dimension, metres (variable measure trade item) (HEIGHT)

data.value: {"Label": "Area, square metres (variable measure trade item)","Attribute": true,"Regex": "(\\d{6})","MaxElements": 6,"Requires": ["01","02"],"Excludes": ["31403145","3140"],"Captures": [{"Fixed": true,"Length": 6}]}
data.comment: Area, square metres (variable measure trade item) (AREA)

data.value: {"Label": "Net volume, litres (variable measure trade item)","Attribute": true,"Regex": "(\\d{6})","MaxElements": 6,"Requires": ["01","02"],"Excludes": ["31503155","3150"],"Captures": [{"Fixed": true,"Length": 6}]}
data.comment: Net volume, litres (variable measure trade item) (NET_VOLUME)

data.value: {"Label": "Length or first dimension, metres","Attribute": true,"Regex": "(\\d{6})","MaxElements": 6,"Requires": ["00","01"],"Excludes": ["33103315","3310"],"Captures": [{"Fixed": true,"Length": 6}]}

{"Label": "Width, diameter, or second dimension, metres","Attribute": true,"Regex": "(\\d{6})","MaxElements": 6,"Requires": ["00","01"],"Excludes": ["33203325","3320"],"Captures": [{"Fixed": true,"Length": 6}]}
data.comment: Width, diameter, or second dimension, metres (LOGISTIC_WIDTH)

data.value: {"Label": "Depth, thickness, height, or third dimension, metres","Attribute": true,"Regex": "(\\d{6})","MaxElements": 6,"Requires": ["00","01"],"Excludes": ["33303335","3330"],"Captures": [{"Fixed": true,"Length": 6}]}
data.comment: Depth, thickness, height, or third dimension, metres (LOGISTIC_HEIGHT)

data.value: {"Label": "Applicable amount payable or Coupon value, local currency","Attribute": true,"Regex": "(\\d{1,15})","MaxElements": 10,"Requires": ["255","8020415","8020","415"],"Excludes": ["39003909","3900","39103919","3910","39403943","3940","8111"],"Captures": [{"Length": 15}]}
data.comment: Applicable amount payable or Coupon value, local currency (PRICE_LOCAL)

data.value: {"Label": "Applicable amount payable with ISO currency code","Attribute": true,"Regex": "(\\d{3})(\\d{1,15})","MaxElements": 10,"Requires": ["8020415","8020","415"],"Excludes": ["39103919","3910"],"Captures": [{"Fixed": true,"Length": 3},{"Length": 15}]}
data.comment: Applicable amount payable with ISO currency code (PRICE)

data.value: {"Label": "Applicable amount payable, single monetary area (variable measure trade item)","Attribute": true,"Regex": "(\\d{1,15})","MaxElements": 10,"Requires": ["30","31003195","3100","32003295","3200","35003595","3500","36003695","3600"],"Excludes": ["39203929","3920","39303939","3930"],"Captures": [{"Length": 15}]}
data.comment: Applicable amount payable, single monetary area (variable measure trade item) (PRICE_LOCAL_TRADE_ITEM)

data.value: {"Label": "Applicable amount payable with ISO currency code (variable measure trade item)","Attribute": true,"Regex": "(\\d{3})(\\d{1,15})","MaxElements": 10,"Requires": ["30","31003195","3100","32003295","3200","35003595","3500","36003695","3600"],"Excludes": ["39303939","3930"],"Captures": [{"Fixed": true,"Length": 3},{"Length": 15}]}
data.comment: Applicable amount payable with ISO currency code (variable measure trade item) (PRICE_TRADE_ITEM)

data.value: {"Label": "Percentage discount of a coupon","Attribute": true,"Regex": "(\\d{4})","MaxElements": 4,"Requires": ["255"],"Excludes": ["39403943","3940","8111"],"Captures": [{"Fixed": true,"Length": 4}]}

{"Label": "Amount Payable per unit of measure single monetary area (variable measure trade item)","Attribute": true,"Regex": "(\\d{6})","MaxElements": 6,"Requires": ["30","31003195","3100","32003295","3200","35003595","3500","36003695","3600"],"Excludes": ["39203929","3920","39303939","3930","39503955","3950","8005"],"Captures": [{"Fixed": true,"Length": 6}]}
data.comment: Amount Payable per unit of measure single monetary area (variable measure trade item) (PRICE_UOM)

data.value: {"Label": "Not before delivery date time (YYMMDDhhmm)","Attribute": true,"Regex": "(\\d{10})","Requires": ["00"],"Captures": [{"Fixed": true,"Length": 6},{"Fixed": true,"Length": 4}]}
{"Label": "Not after delivery date time (YYMMDDhhmm)","Attribute": true,"Regex": "(\\d{10})","Requires": ["00"],"Captures": [{"Fixed": true,"Length": 6},{"Fixed": true,"Length": 4}]}

{"Label": "Maximum temperature in Fahrenheit (expressed in hundredths of degrees)","Attribute": true,"Regex": "(\\d{6}[-]?)","Requires": ["00"],"Excludes": ["4331"],"Captures": [{"Fixed": true,"Length": 6},{"Fixed": true,"Length": 1}]}
data.comment: Maximum temperature (expressed in hundredths of degrees) (MAXIMUM_TEMPERATURE)

data.value: {"Label": "Minimum temperature in Celsius (expressed in hundredths of degrees)","Attribute": true,"Regex": "(\\d{6}[-]?)","Requires": ["00"],"Excludes": ["4332"],"Captures": [{"Fixed": true,"Length": 6},{"Fixed": true,"Length": 1}]}
data.comment: Minimum temperature (expressed in hundredths of degrees) (MINIMUM_TEMPERATURE)

data.value: {"Label": "UN/ECE meat carcasses and cuts classification","Attribute": true,"Regex": "([!%-?A-Z_a-z\\x22]{1,30})","Requires": ["01","02"],"Captures": [{"Length": 30}]}
data.comment: UN/ECE meat carcasses and cuts classification (MEAT_CUT_UN_ECE)

data.value: {"Label": "Expiration date and time (YYMMDDhhmm)","Attribute": true,"Regex": "(\\d{10})","Requires": ["01","02"],"Captures": [{"Fixed": true,"Length": 6},{"Fixed": true,"Length": 4}]}
{"Label": "Global Individual Asset Identifier (GIAI) of an assembly","Attribute": true,"Regex": "([!%-?A-Z_a-z\\x22]{1,30})","Captures": [{"Length": 30}]}
data.comment: Global Individual Asset Identifier (GIAI) of an assembly (ASSEMBLY_GIAI)

data.value: {"Label": "Number of processor with three-digit ISO country code","Attribute": true,"Regex": "(\\d{3})([!%-?A-Z_a-z\\x22]{1,27})","MaxElements": 10,"Requires": ["01","02"],"Captures": [{"Fixed": true,"Length": 3},{"Length": 27}]}
data.comment: Number of processor with three-digit ISO country code (PROCESSOR_NUMBER)

data.value: {"Label": "GS1 UIC with Extension 1 and Importer index","Regex": "(\\d)([!%-?A-Z_a-z\\x22])([!%-?A-Z_a-z\\x22])([!%-?A-Z_a-z\\x22])","Captures": [{"Fixed": true,"Length": 1},{"Fixed": true,"Length": 1},{"Fixed": true,"Length": 1},{"Fixed": true,"Length": 1}]}
data.comment: GS1 UIC with Extension 1 and Importer index (UIC_EXTENSION)

data.value: {"Label": "Date and time of birth (YYYYMMDDhhmm)","Attribute": true,"Regex": "(\\d{4}(?:0\\d|1[0-2])(?:[0-2]\\d|3[01])(?:[01]\\d|2[0-3])(?:[0-5]\\d))","Requires": ["8018"],"Excludes": ["7250"],"Captures": [{"Fixed": true,"Length": 8},{"Fixed": true,"Length": 4}]}

{"Label": "Roll products (width, length, core diameter, direction, splices)","Attribute": true,"Regex": "(\\d{4})(\\d{5})(\\d{3})(\\d{1})(\\d{1})","Requires": ["01"],"Captures": [{"Fixed": true,"Length": 4},{"Fixed": true,"Length": 5},{"Fixed": true,"Length": 3},{"Fixed": true,"Length": 1},{"Fixed": true,"Length": 1}]}
data.comment: Roll products (width, length, core diameter, direction, splices) (DIMENSIONS)

data.value: {"Label": "Global Returnable Asset Identifier (GRAI)","Attribute": true,"Regex": "(0)(\\d{13})([!%-?A-Z_a-z\\x22]{0,16})","Captures": [{"Fixed": true,"Length": 1},{"CheckDigit": true,"Fixed": true,"Length": 13},{"Length": 16}]}
{"Label": "Price per unit of measure","Attribute": true,"Regex": "(\\d{6})","Requires": ["01","02"],"Captures": [{"Fixed": true,"Length": 6}]}

{"Label": "Identification of an individual trade item piece (ITIP)","Attribute": true,"Regex": "(\\d{14})(\\d{4})","Qualifiers": ["22","10","21"],"Excludes": ["01","37"],"Captures": [{"CheckDigit": true,"Fixed": true,"Length": 14},{"Fixed": true,"Length": 4}]}
data.comment: Identification of an individual trade item piece (ITIP) (ITIP)

data.value: {"Label": "Date and time of production (YYMMDDhh[mm[ss]])","Attribute": true,"Regex": "(\\d{2}(?:0\\d|1[0-2])(?:[0-2]\\d|3[01])(?:[01]\\d|2[0-3]))((?:[0-5]\\d)(?:[0-5]\\d)?)?","Requires": ["01","02"],"Captures": [{"Fixed": true,"Length": 8},{"Length": 4}]}

{"Label": "Global Service Relation Number (GSRN) to identify the relationship between an organisation offering services and the provider of services","Attribute": true,"Regex": "(\\d{18})","Qualifiers": ["8019"],"Excludes": ["8018"],"Captures": [{"CheckDigit": true,"Fixed": true,"Length": 18}]}
data.comment: Global Service Relation Number (GSRN) to identify the relationship between an organisation offering services and the provider of services (GSRN_PROVIDER)

data.value: {"Label": "Global Service Relation Number (GSRN) to identify the relationship between an organisation offering services and the recipient of services","Attribute": true,"Regex": "(\\d{18})","Qualifiers": ["8019"],"Excludes": ["8017"],"Captures": [{"CheckDigit": true,"Fixed": true,"Length": 18}]}
data.comment: Global Service Relation Number (GSRN) to identify the relationship between an organisation offering services and the recipient of services (GSRN_RECIPIENT)

data.value: {"Label": "Identification of pieces of a trade item (ITIP) contained in a logistic unit","Attribute": true,"Regex": "(\\d{14})(\\d{4})","Requires": ["0037","00","37"],"Excludes": ["02","8006"],"Captures": [{"CheckDigit": true,"Fixed": true,"Length": 14},{"Fixed": true,"Length": 4}]}
data.comment: Identification of pieces of a trade item (ITIP) contained in a logistic unit (ITIP_CONTENT)

data.value: {"Label": "Coupon code identification for use in North America","Attribute": true,"Regex": "([!%-?A-Z_a-z\\x22]{1,70})","Captures": [{"Length": 70}]}
data.comment: Coupon code identification for use in North America (COUPON_CODE)

data.value: {"Label": "Loyalty points of a coupon","Attribute": true,"Regex": "(\\d{4})","Requires": ["255"],"Captures": [{"Fixed": true,"Length": 4}]}
{"Label": "Positive offer file coupon code identification for use in North America","Attribute": true,"Regex": "([!%-?A-Z_a-z\\x22]{1,70})","Captures": [{"Length": 70}]}
data.comment: Positive offer file coupon code identification for use in North America (POSITIVE_OFFER_COUPON_CODE)
